selected.current_evidence_strength: Static evidence found related Python test context, but the current proof is weak because the discriminator is missing.
selected.focused_proof_intent: Strengthen the existing related test in `tests/test_pricing.py`: `assert calculate_discount(amount=threshold, threshold=threshold) == expected_discount`.
selected.why: A related Python test reaches this change, but no boundary discriminator was found for the changed behavior.
selected.static_limit_detail: Python repair cards are preview advisory evidence.
selected.static_evidence_boundary: static advisory evidence only; not runtime proof, coverage adequacy, mutation confirmation, gate approval, or merge approval.

commands.regenerate_gap_ledger: ripr check --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/python-preview-gap --base origin/main --json > target/ripr/reports/check.json && ripr reports gap-ledger --check-output target/ripr/reports/check.json --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/python-preview-gap --out inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out-md inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.md

artifacts.label: Gap decision ledger
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr check --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/python-preview-gap --base origin/main --json > target/ripr/reports/check.json && ripr reports gap-ledger --check-output target/ripr/reports/check.json --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/python-preview-gap --out inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out-md inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.md

artifacts.label: PR repair cards
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr review-comments --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/python-preview-gap --base origin/main --head HEAD --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out target/ripr/review/comments.json

artifacts.label: Gate decision
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr gate evaluate --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out target/ripr/reports/gate-decision.json --out-md target/ripr/reports/gate-decision.md

authority.boundary: Pass/fail authority remains with explicit gate-decision artifacts when configured; this first-run packet does not gate.

limits: Does not edit source or generate tests.
Does not change CI blocking or gate policy.
